description: Paid facts for AI agents via x402: on-chain snapshots, endpoint reliability, trading calculators.
name: io.github.npraught/orcpin

environmentVariables.description: Private key (0x + 64 hex) of a dedicated, low-balance Base wallet holding a few dollars of USDC. Used only to sign gasless x402 payment authorizations; never transmitted.
environmentVariables.name: ORCPIN_PRIVATE_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Optional comma-separated subset of tools to expose: "defi" (chain + endpoint-reliability tools) and/or "trading" (trade-log calculators). Default: all eight tools.
environmentVariables.name: ORCPIN_TOOLSETS

environmentVariables.description: x402 network id. Default eip155:8453 (Base mainnet).
environmentVariables.name: X402_NETWORK
